text: I've been trying to get a hold of customer support for days now. My last order arrived damaged, and despite multiple attempts to reach out, I haven't received any response. It’s incredibly frustrating, considering the time and effort I usually put into ensuring everything goes well. I expected better service and now, I feel completely ignored.
I’m really frustrated! Just got my order and it’s not what I expected. Items are swapped. This shouldn’t happen.
I thought I was getting a premium product, but it’s not what you advertised. I’m really disappointed... feels like a scam, but I guess I’ll just keep it now?

I really hoped this would work, but it didn’t fit right at all. Now I’m stuck with something that’s worthless to me. I just want a refund, please. It's so frustrating because I was excited about this purchase... Why can’t I just get my money back? It feels unfair, especially since I followed all the sizing info you provided.

I’m trying to figure out if there are any scheduled outages this weekend, but I also heard something about the system being down next week? Can someone clarify if I should expect anything this weekend or is it all clear? I just want to plan accordingly, you know?
Received a package, but only one of the two items I ordered was inside. Can I get a refund for the missing item?
I need a refund. The item arrived damaged, and I never expected this. It was a gift for a friend, very disappointing.
hey, i got the sneakers but they don’t fit right. can i get my cash back instead of a store credit?
Can someone confirm if the update will roll out on Friday or was it pushed back? I also need to know if that affects the rest of the deadlines.
Hey, I can't get into my account since I changed my phone and forgot my new password, and I don’t have the old one anymore.

Hey, so I was thinking... is there a chance you guys will ever allow us to host this on our own servers? Just curious, I mean, I love the service, but sometimes the cloud stuff makes me anxious, especially when my cat is sitting on the keyboard and causing chaos.
I seem to be experiencing some kind of... issue with your service, but I can't pinpoint exactly what is going wrong. Could you provide some guidance on this matter?
Is there a chance that you will ever offer options for local server setups, or is everything just going to stay in the cloud, like forever? Also, what about that last update with the bug I mentioned?
Hey, I just switched my phone and now I can’t log in. I think I forgot my username or something, not sure. Can you check on that?
hey my shirt came all torn!!! I need a refund or smth, pls help!
I expected my order to arrive yesterday, but it didn't. I was told it was shipped last week, but now I hear it might still be in the warehouse? This doesn't make sense.
